aboutPara1: At Avodah Kitchen, every plate tells a story of fire, flavor, and craft. We take classic American favorites — dry-aged steaks, handmade pasta, and gourmet burgers — and elevate them with quality ingredients, bold technique, and a touch of indulgence.
aboutPara2: From the first sizzle on the grill to the last bite of dessert, our mission is simple: create a dining experience so memorable, you'll already be planning your next visit.
aboutPara3: Whether you're joining us for a quiet dinner or gathering the people who matter most for a celebration, we want every visit to feel like it was made just for you.
testimonial3Quote: Warm, elegant, and the wagyu burger genuinely stopped our conversation. We booked our next visit before we even left.
testimonial2Quote: The truffle fettuccine is worth the trip alone — and the Old Fashioned might be the best in the city.
testimonial1Quote: Best steak I've had in Avodah Kitchen. The sizzle when it hit the table said it all.
service1Desc: Intimate rooms for celebrations, corporate dinners, and special occasions.
menuPageBlurb: Dry-aged steaks, handmade pasta, and gourmet classics — crafted with fire and technique.
service2Desc: Full-service catering for events of every size.
service3Desc: A leisurely, indulgent brunch service every Sunday from 10AM.
address: Avodah Kitchen, C3 Road Badelles Hills, Iligan City, Philippines, 9200
menuSectionBlurb: A taste of what awaits — dry-aged steaks, handmade pasta, and craft cocktails, each dish built around fire and technique.
pillar1Desc: Dishes made with care, meant to be shared.
pillar2Desc: Every guest treated like family, every visit.
pillar3Desc: Moments worth celebrating, and worth returning for.
storyPara1: At Avodah Kitchen, every plate tells a story of fire, flavor, and craft. We take classic American favorites — dry-aged steaks, handmade pasta, and gourmet burgers — and elevate them with quality ingredients, bold technique, and a touch of indulgence.

aboutIntro: Every plate we serve carries a little bit of who we are — here's more of our story.
